title: Preview preflight and replay-safe apply saga
content: sequenceDiagram
participant H as Owner or Agent Host
participant P as classify.apply.preview
participant A as classify.apply.run
participant S as classify.db
participant L as LEDGER public executor
H->>P: current outcomes, exact rule, or explicit corrections
P->>L: purpose=apply_preflight plus exact transaction IDs
L-->>P: all items, mutation states, allocations, revisions
P->>S: persist expiry-bound preview and preconditions
P-->>H: preview evidence and id
H->>A: preview id plus apply identity
A->>L: repeat purpose=apply_preflight for all items
L-->>A: exact current items and revisions
alt any missing, stale, or ineligible item
A-->>H: reject whole run before mutation
else all current
loop deterministic item order
A->>S: persist planned operation, preconditions, and key
A->>L: assign absent allocation or correct expected allocation
L-->>A: atomic precondition and replay-safe result
A->>S: persist terminal item result
end
A-->>H: exact per-item result envelope
end
Note over A,L: crash resume replays only planned or unresolved items with frozen requests and keys
